positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical celestial jungle scene. Giant, bioluminescent crystalline flora emit soft aqua, violet, and gold light, illuminating delicate, stylized forest creatures (like geometric foxes and winged moths). The composition features a strong central mandala pattern, surrounded by stylized, contrasting silhouettes of tropical foliage and mystical elements. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with geometric minimalism, highly intricate line work, deep contrast, clean vector aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, black and white base with limited vibrant color accents, smooth gradients, perfect symmetry.
negative: ugly, tiling, poorly drawn, distorted, grainy, watermark, signature, logo, text, artifact, messy lines, blurry, noise, bad anatomy, lowres, monochrome only, jpeg artifacts, deep shadows
